title: Multiple claude agent in the same window?
summary: Claude Opus 4.8 introduced Dynamic Workflows, which allows spawning hundreds of subagents within a single session to parallelize task execution. The system automatically decomposes work, distributes it among subagents, and employs verification agents to check completed tasks, similar to a contractor with a full team and QA crew.
